examples.text: وقال وزير داخلية فرنسا إنه تم وضع نحو 69 ألفا من أفراد الشرطة على أهبة الاستعداد السبت، وجرى تعزيز القوات في مدن تولوز وبوردو وسانت ايتيين.
examples.english: The Minister of Interior of France said that 69 thousand of police units have been equipped to be ready on Saturday and the forces in the cities of Toulouse and Bordeaux and Saint-Ètienne have been strengthened.

etymology.text: Akin to Aramaic יהבא (“load, burden”), and an Aramaism יהב in Psalm 55, 23. Likely related to Akkadian 𒀀𒊭𒁍 (a-ša-bu /⁠ašābu⁠/, “to sit down”) bearing also in the form IV 𒋗𒋗𒁍 (šu-šu-bu /⁠šūšubu⁠/) the here notable senses of “settling” and of “staying in an ambush”, “being assigned to be a garrison soldier”, which are occasions where one would need gear or supplies.

body.text: Apparatus, equipments, equipage, accoutrements, furniture, gear, tackling, implements, instruments, tools,
He took his apparatus, &c., for that thing,
